channel.title: RSS Aggregator Feed
channel.description: An aggregated feed of Technology-related news

item.title: Lenovo teste une batterie haute densité pour PC portables
item.description: Le silicium arrive enfin dans nos PC. Lenovo s'attaque au mur de l'autonomie avec un prototype de batterie affichant 1 000 Wh/l de densité énergétique.

item.title: Mozilla is launching a free built-in VPN on Firefox 149 — but with some conditions
item.description: Mozilla is adding a free built-in VPN to Firefox 149. But with a strict 50GB data limit and restricted geographic availability, will it replace your dedicated app?

item.title: À moins de 160 euros, ce smartphone de Motorola (pOLED, 120 Hz) devient un excellent choix
item.description: Chez E.Leclerc, le Motorola Moto G85 5G flirte avec les 150 euros. Grâce à sa dalle pOLED et à une autonomie de quasiment deux jours, ce smartphone possède désormais un excellent rapport qualité-prix.

item.title: The great EV pullback: all the obstacles, cancellations, and delays
item.description: The auto industry bet big on electric vehicles, but now those ambitious goals are falling apart. Demand was already slowing down when Donald Trump took office and took an ax to pro-EV policy: the elimination of the federal EV tax credit, kneecapping clean energy, and bulldozing emissions rules. Tariffs have been taking their toll as […]

item.title: Hulu Assassinated the ‘Hitman’ TV Series This Week, Too
item.description: Plus, 'Booster Gold' TV writer Paul Jenkins offers a vague update on those cancelation rumors.

item.title: Nvidia has lost the plot with gamers
item.description: Nvidia surely thought it was doing a good thing for gamers by "upgrading" the faces of our favorite video game characters. But that just shows how much the company has lost the plot. Nvidia could've marketed its new DLSS 5 real-time lighting technology as a way to make future, next-gen games look better. Instead, it […]

item.title: What is the release date for Monarch: Legacy of Monsters season 2 episode 4 on Apple TV?
item.description: Here's when the next episode of Monarch: Legacy of Monsters season 2 will air on Apple's streaming service.

item.title: What is the release date for The Madison episodes 4-6 on Paramount+?
item.description: Taylor Sheridan's latest show has whistled past us already, but when is The Madison episodes 4-6 on Paramount+?

item.title: It's time for Game Freak to finally give Pokémon some proper voice acting
item.description: Ever since making the jump to the Nintendo Switch, there's something that's bugged me about practically every modern Pokémon game, a feeling that has only intensified after spending countless hours in Pokopia. For titles based in big, open worlds and filled with adorable polygonal characters and lovely music, why is nearly every pokémon still saddled with a call that sounds like a dial-up internet connection? As someone who played Pokémon Red and Blue at launch, I'm very aware that the origin of these sounds is tied directly back to those original titles on Game Boy, which was powered by an 8-...

item.title: I’ve spent weeks with the Acer Predator Orion 5000, and it’s brought power and performance to my games, and smoothness to my work
item.description: After searching for a new pre-built gaming PC for weeks, the Acer Predator Orion 5000 has answered my call and proved to be the perfect mid-range machine.

item.title: Mave Health aims to improve attention and mood with its brain-stimulating headset
item.description: Mave Health is listing the headset at $495 for pre-orders. It aims to ship devices to users in the U.S. and India in April 2026.

item.title: Spotify brings Exclusive Mode to Windows for bit-perfect playback — but there are a few trade-offs you should know about
item.description: Spotify for Windows just got a big upgrade — and audiophiles are going to love this one.

item.title: BMW's i3 is reborn as a sporty 440 mile range EV sedan
item.description: After letting us drive a prototype around in the snow earlier this month, BMW has fully unveiled its all-new i3 electric vehicle. It's a far cry from the original funky hatch launched way back in 2013, offering more of everything including power, range and space. It also looks like you'd hope a 3-series EV would: a sporty sedan, minus the polarizing grille on the gas-powered M3. The i3 uses BMW's Neue Klasse platform and indeed borrows inspiration from the company's Vision Neue Klasse concept unveiled in 2023. With motors on the front and rear in the 50 xDrive configuration, along with the 80...

item.title: Save $400 on our top-tested phone SSD: Boost your iPhone and Android storage with the 2TB SanDisk Creator SSD
item.description: SanDisk's 2TB external SSD is now available at a huge discount, offering fast speeds, magnetic phone attachment, and direct high-quality video recording.

item.title: Intel déploie une techno redoutable pour accélérer le chargement de vos jeux
item.description: Intel prend de l'avance face à Nvidia et AMD sur un point précis : la prise en charge des shaders précompilés par ses cartes graphiques Intel ARC, mais aussi par ses dernières générations d'iGPU. Cette technologie permet d'accélérer sensiblement le temps de chargement d'un nombre croissant de jeux.

item.title: Telegram shutdown begins in Russia — here's everything we know
item.description: Russian Telegram users have been reporting struggles to use the app since the weekend, ahead of the full blockage expected in April. VPNs seem to be working — but this may soon change.

item.title: Humanscale’s New $15K Lounge Chair Is the Ultimate Home Office Workstation
item.description: The final project from famed designer Niels Diffrient, the Diffrient Lounge is made for work and play in high-budget homes.

item.title: DLSS 5: Has Nvidia’s AI graphics technology gone too far?
item.description: Nvidia has revealed a new “3D guided neural rendering model” called DLSS 5 that can change a game’s lighting and materials in real-time, and… many gamers aren’t happy. From DLSS 5 memes to complaints about how it’s “yassified” Resident Evil Requiem characters in demos, the first impression has not been a good one, no matter […]

item.title: En pleine pénurie, la Fnac décide de faire passer ce SSD 1 To pour PS5 sous les 100 euros
item.description: Pour libérer de l'espace sur votre PS5, vous pouvez compter sur le Lexar Play 2280 et son espace de stockage d'1 To. Il est actuellement vendu à la Fnac pour 99,99 euros au lieu de 119,99 euros.

item.title: Les Google Pixel subissent un bug d’affichage après la mise à jour de mars
item.description: Chez Google, les mises à jour sont synonymes de nouveautés, mais également de bugs en tout genre. La dernière version n’y échappe pas et vient bloquer l’affichage permanent de certains Google Pixel.

item.title: Elijah Wood reveals the LOTR group chat name, shares what their daily exchange looks like
item.description: Elijah Wood spoke to Stephen Colbert about the "Lord of the Rings" group chat.

item.title: Fitbit is promising a 15% accuracy boost for sleep tracking thanks to some 'significant updates' for Premium subscribers
item.description: If you're signed up for the Personal Health Coach, there are upgrades coming for sleep and health data.

item.title: The Defense Department reportedly plans to train AI models on classified military data
item.description: The Pentagon is making plans to have AI companies train versions of their models specifically for military use on classified information, according to the MIT Technology Review. If true, it wouldn’t come as a surprise, seeing as the US is aiming to become an “AI-first" warfighting force, based on the statement [PDF] released by Secretary of Defense Pete Hegseth earlier this year. The department is already using AI models in the military: For instance, the US reportedly used Anthropic’s Claude to help with the capture of Venezuelan President Nicolás Maduro and with its attack on Iran, even afte...

item.title: The First Trailer for ‘Spider-Man: Brand New Day’ Teases Spidey’s Big New Problems
item.description: Brand new days, same old crises for Peter Parker.

item.title: Jessica Jones Is Back in the MCU Because ‘Jessica Jones’ Was So Good
item.description: Krysten Ritter returns as the hero in 'Daredevil: Born Again' season two, which begins on March 24.

item.title: How to prepare your phone for trade-in
item.description: There was once a time in which many people couldn't wait to toss their smartphone aside every two years (and sometimes even more frequently) in order to get the latest model as soon as it hit shelves. But that world has faded for the most part now as shoppers demand devices that last for years so they can hold on to them for longer. And when the time finally comes to upgrade, many are being more conscientious about what happens to their old gadgets. You may want to trade in your smartphone or sell it when you're ready to upgrade; either option can keep your device out of a landfill in addition...

item.title: Apple Studio Display XDR review: Expensive, but there’s no monitor like it
item.description: It’s hard for most people to justify spending $3,299 on a monitor, but creative pros will gladly do so if it makes their jobs easier. Apple’s 27-inch 5K Studio Display XDR is aimed straight at those folks and it costs considerably less than the company’s previous high-end monitor, the 6K Pro Display XDR. Thanks to the Mini LED IPS panel, the Studio Display XDR has higher brightness and color accuracy than nearly any other monitor on the market. It also has tech that boosts contrast to outperform similar displays. With its unique combination of features, the Studio Display XDR isn’t as overpric...

item.title: 5 Best Folding Phones (2026), Tested and Reviewed
item.description: Ready to move on from the traditional glass slab? Introduce a hinge into your life with these folding smartphones.

item.title: Enterprise AI agents keep operating from different versions of reality — Microsoft says Fabric IQ is the fix
item.description: In 2026, data engineers working with multi-agent systems are hitting a familiar problem: Agents built on different platforms don’t operate from a shared understanding of the business. The result isn’t model failure — it’s hallucination driven by fragmented context.The problem is that agents built on different platforms, by different teams, do not share a common understanding of how the business actually operates. Each one carries its own interpretation of what a customer, an order or a region means. When those definitions diverge across a workforce of agents, decisions break down.A set of anno...

item.title: Boîte de réception | Sans-fil canadien en Europe, service internet et usure des batteries
item.description: Chaque mercredi, notre journaliste répond à vos questions en lien avec le numérique et les nouvelles technologies. Cette semaine, on utilise un sans-fil en Europe en toute confiance, on change de service internet et on s’interroge sur la piètre durabilité de certaines batteries d’ordinateurs portables.

item.title: Dune Part 3 trailer is the most beautiful bore I’ve ever seen — but we’re still not ready to have that conversation
item.description: You’re entitled to your wrong opinion about the Dune Part 3 trailer — Denis Villeneuve has birthed a beautiful bore.

item.title: L’Oppo Find N6 a l’écran pliant le plus plat au monde, mais est-ce pour autant un bon écran ? Réponse avec l’analyse du 01lab
item.description: L'Oppo Find N6, premier smartphone pliant sans pliure, ne sort pas en France mais se distingue par son écran innovant. Sa luminosité maximale de 1500 cd/m² est inférieure à celle de ses concurrents, bien que son pic HDR soit correct. La colorimétrie est bien calibrée, proche du Xiaomi 17 Ultra, offrant de bonnes performances pour un écran pliant.

item.title: Kohl’s stores closing update: CEO reveals what happens next after dozens of locations shuttered last year
item.description: Though the department store chain has had its struggles, the vast majority of its stores are profitable, according to boss Michael Bender. Last year, the CEO of the department store chain Kohl’s (NYSE: KSS) announced the closure of 27 locations in order to help shore up the company’s struggling finances.

item.title: Nvidia's CEO goes full Principal Skinner in response to DLSS 5 backlash — says it's the gamers who are 'completely wrong'
item.description: 'This is very different than generative AI; it's content-control generative AI': Nvidia's CEO defends DLSS 5 in no uncertain terms.

item.title: Nouvelle démission chez Apple : le responsable du HomePod et du futur « HomePad » claque la porte
item.description: Apple perd une figure clé de sa stratégie maison connectée. Après près de 24 ans de bons et loyaux services, Brian Lynch, l'un des responsables du HomePod et du futur « HomePad » avec écran, vient de démissionner pour prendre la tête de l’ingénierie matérielle d’Oura.

item.title: Black Cat is coming to Marvel Rivals and let's just say fans are looking forward to it a little too much — 'This update is HUGE'
item.description: Marvel Rivals Season 7 has been revealed, and its trailer features an iconic Spider-Man villain.

item.title: How Yuval Sharon and Es Devlin are using cutting-edge tech to push opera forward—just when it needs it most
item.description: Want a glimpse at opera’s next act? Look no further than a buzzy production of Richard Wagner’s ‘Tristan und Isolde’ at New York’s Met Opera. Despite what Timothée Chalamet may think, the Metropolitan Opera’s production of Richard Wagner’s epic Tristan und Isolde is generating a lot of buzz this season.

item.title: Best Barefoot Shoes for Running or Walking (2026)
item.description: Our favorite zero-drop, minimalist footwear will let you feel the ground beneath your feet.

item.title: Samsung’s Galaxy Z TriFold was short-lived — here’s why it’s being scrapped, and why users saw it coming
item.description: Samsung is stopping all sales on the Galaxy Z TriFold and some users are upset, but others knew this would happen.

item.title: Pourquoi s’embêter à monter son PC quand cette tour avec RTX 5080 existe déjà et coûte 300 € de moins ?
item.description: Voilà une tour PC prête à tout encaisser avec un Ryzen 7 8700F, 32 Go de RAM DDR5, 2 To de SSD et surtout une RTX 5080 taillée pour le jeu en 4K et le ray tracing. Affichée avec 300 euros de moins, cette tour devient une très bonne affaire dans un contexte où le tarif des composants ne cesse de s’envoler.
